target_area.description: Discussion boundary-method paragraph and the adjacent Conclusion/page-10 flow

change_summary: Replaced the final boundary paragraph sentence with a shorter punchline: 'The method is the boundary: portable scene workflows carry auditable claims only inside the gates they pass.'
Removed the rendered page-9 hyphenation where 'These bound-' and 'portable-' split the Discussion's closing claim.
Preserved the claim-boundary meaning while making the Discussion-to-Conclusion handoff more direct.

observations: Before: page 9 rendered 'These bound-' followed by 'aries' and then 'portable-' followed by 'scene', weakening the Discussion's closing punchline.
After: page 9 renders 'The method is the boundary: portable scene workflows carry auditable claims only inside the gates they pass.' without the old boundary/portable splits.
Conclusion still starts on page 9, and page 10 remains visually stable after the localized paragraph compaction.
